style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A vertical fence runs down the middle. On the inside, a path labelled SANCTIONED passes through a small gate labelled CONTROLS to a box labelled SAFE. On the outside, a path labelled SHADOW IT runs around the fence, skipping the controls, ending at a box labelled EXPOSED with a small rust warning mark. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A vertical fence runs down the middle. On the inside, a path labelled SANCTIONED passes through a small gate labelled CONTROLS to a box labelled SAFE. On the outside, a path labelled SHADOW IT runs around the fence, skipping the controls, ending at a box labelled EXPOSED with a small rust warning mark. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
